---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in the specification, schema, or platform extensions
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the bug.

## Location

Which file(s) contain the defect?

- Spec version:
- File(s):
- Line(s) / field(s):

## Expected vs actual

**Expected.** What the spec or schema should say or do.
**Actual.** What it currently says or does.

## Reproduction

If this is a schema acceptance bug, attach the smallest manifest that
triggers the wrong verdict and state the validator (and version) used.

```yaml
# minimal reproducer
```

## Impact

Who is affected? Conformant consumers? Only implementers of one
platform extension?

## Proposed fix

Optional. If you already see the change, describe it.
